mapper.sql: rdjd.demand_job_id, rdjd.job_name, rdjd.dept_name, rdjd.directly_under, rdjd.job_describes, rdjd.job_content, rdjd.work_qualification, rdjd.check_flag, rdjd.enabled_flag, rdjd.id, rdjd.create_time, rdjd.create_by, rdjd.update_time, rdjd.update_by,rdjd.dept_id, rdjd.education, rdjd.sex, rdjd.age, rdjd.work_age, rdjd.work_experence_age, rdjd.necessary_certificates, rdjd.other_skills_requirements, rdjd.skills_requirements

${tAlias}.demand_job_id as ${tAlias}_demand_job_id, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.directly_under as ${tAlias}_directly_under, ${tAlias}.job_describes as ${tAlias}_job_describes, ${tAlias}.job_content as ${tAlias}_job_content, ${tAlias}.work_qualification as ${tAlias}_work_qualification, ${tAlias}.check_flag as ${tAlias}_check_flag, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.education as ${tAlias}_education,${tAlias}.sex as ${tAlias}_sex, ${tAlias}.age as ${tAlias}_age,${tAlias}.work_age as ${tAlias}_work_age, ${tAlias}.work_experence_age as ${tAlias}_work_experence_age,${tAlias}.necessary_certificates as ${tAlias}_necessary_certificates, ${tAlias}.other_skills_requirements as ${tAlias}_other_skills_requirements, ${tAlias}.skills_requirements as ${tAlias}_skills_requirements
mapper.insert: insert into re_demand_job_describes (demand_job_id, job_name, dept_name, directly_under, job_describes, job_content, work_qualification, check_flag, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, dept_id, education, sex, age, work_age, work_experence_age, necessary_certificates, other_skills_requirements, skills_requirements) values (#{demandJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{directlyUnder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workQualification,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checkFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{education, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{sex, jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{age, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{workAge, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{workExperenceAge, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{necessaryCertificates, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{otherSkillsRequirements, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{skillsRequirements, jdbcType = VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update re_demand_job_describes set demand_job_id = #{demandJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, directly_under = #{directlyUnder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_describes = #{jobDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_content = #{jobContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_qualification = #{workQualification,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_id = #{deptId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, education = #{education, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, age = #{age, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, work_age = #{workAge, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, work_experence_age = #{workExperenceAge, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, necessary_certificates = #{necessaryCertificates, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, other_skills_requirements = #{otherSkillsRequirements, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, skills_requirements = #{skillsRequirements, jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select count(1) from re_demand_job_describes where enabled_flag = 1 and check_flag = 1 and demand_job_id in
#{item, jdbcType=BIGINT}
